name: What should I do first if I want my content to show up in AI search answers?
description: Start with priority pages, put the direct answer near the top, and add factual supporting details. Clear Q&A structure helps AI systems extract and cite your co

mainEntity.name: What should I do first if I want my content to show up in AI search answers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Start with your highest-value pages and make the main answer visible near the top, then support it with factual details, examples, and clear headings. Pages that directly answer a question and use an FAQ-style structure are easier for AI systems to parse and retrieve.
acceptedAnswer.description: Start with priority pages, put the direct answer near the top, and add factual supporting details. Clear Q&A structure helps AI systems extract and cite your content.
